thought.text: I need to update the Task 2 lexer tokens and the parser grammar. Let me first fix the tokens and lexer, then handle the parser

reasoning_content:
I need to update the Task 2 lexer to support all the new token types from Task 1. The files to modify are:

1. `/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.tokens` - Add new token types
2. `/workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsULexer.cpp` - Update `kClangTokens` map with new tokens

And the parser `SYsUParser.g4` also needs to be updated to handle the full C subset grammar (if, else, while, break, continue, const, void, relational/logical operators, etc.)

Let me first fix the lexer, then fix the parser grammar.
